Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-19 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data shows two exceptional performers at the top of the long-term momentum rankings. LINC ranks #1 with a score of 95.0, displaying extraordinarily consistent returns across all timeframes—155.91% over 1 year, 492.12% over 5 years, and 1293.09% over 10 years—while maintaining all four moving average support levels and a "strong_buy" signal. FUWAY ranks #2 with even more explosive recent momentum (208.8% in 3 months, 302.78% in 1 year) but shows some volatility patterns with a 6-month pullback (197.5% vs 208.8% in 3-month), a lower ratio_passes count of 3 versus LINC's 4, and a slightly concerning vol_ratio of 1.935 flagged as "confirmed." Both securities dramatically outpace SPY across all relative performance windows—LINC by 138-1062 percentage points depending on timeframe, and FUWAY by 250-697 points—suggesting they represent significant secular winners independent of broad market trends. The correlation profiles show both gravitate toward cyclical/industrial sectors (XLB, XLI) rather than defensive assets, indicating their outperformance is tied to
